title: Resolution Authorizing the Local Chief Executive Honorable Mayor Antonio L. Kalaw to Enter Into a Memorandum of Agreement MOA) with the Department of Environment and Natural Resources (DENR) Regional Office Iv-a for the Fabrication and Installation of Multi-purpose Shredder for the Municipal Government and Ratifying the Same Thereafter. (AUTHOR : COUNCILOR CRIS DAYRIL B. BAGNES, 12/21/2020)
